addText.label: Add a text item
addText.placeholder: Enter text to convert to speech…

upload.label: Upload a .txt (one item per line)
upload.tooLarge: That file is too large (max 5 MB).

metadata.defaultsHint: Some fields are pre-filled from deployment defaults. Change or clear any of them; the title is never pre-filled.
metadata.title: Title
metadata.skipped: Some tags aren’t supported by this format and were skipped: {fields}.
metadata.skippedAll: This format can’t carry tags, so the metadata was skipped.

queue.empty: No items yet — type text or upload a .txt to build your list.
queue.deleteMessage: This removes {count} item(s) from the queue. This can’t be undone.

workspace.detailEmpty: Select an item to edit its details.

edit.instructionsPlaceholder: Describe the delivery, e.g. calm and warm…
edit.instructionsNotApplied: This model ignores instructions — they’re kept but won’t be applied.
edit.tagsSkipped: This format can’t carry tags, so the metadata will be skipped when you generate.

queueFile.replaceMessage: Opening this file replaces the {count} item(s) currently in your queue.

error.schema: That file isn’t an EchoRecall queue file.
error.version: That queue file was made by a newer version and can’t be opened.
error.shape: That queue file is damaged or invalid.

library.title: Library
library.loadError: Could not load your library. Please try again.

search.label: Search
search.placeholder: Search title, text, tags, or filename…

bulkClean.title: Bulk-clean the library
bulkClean.description: Permanently remove every saved item matching these filters, along with its audio. This can’t be undone.
bulkClean.needFilter: Choose a date range and/or a voice first.

editor.confirmMessage: This permanently removes the clip and its audio. This can’t be undone.

errors.invalidFilename: That file name is empty or can’t be used. Try another.
errors.delete: Could not delete that item. Please try again.
errors.bulkClean: Could not clean the library. Please try again.

openaiKey.title: OpenAI API key
openaiKey.description: Set an OpenAI key for this app. It’s stored encrypted on the server and is never shown again.
openaiKey.none: No key set in the app — the environment key is used if available.
openaiKey.disabledNotice: Set NUXT_APP_SECRET on the server to store an OpenAI key in the app. The environment key (if any) is still used.

errors.load: Could not load the key status.
errors.save: Could not save the key. Please try again.
errors.disabled: In-app key storage is disabled. Set NUXT_APP_SECRET to enable it.
errors.clear: Could not clear the key. Please try again.

defaultTags.title: Default tag values
defaultTags.description: Pre-fill new generations with these tag values. Title is never defaulted.
defaultTags.saved: Saved values are pre-filled on new generations.
defaultTags.none: No defaults set — new generations start with empty tags.

errors.load: Could not load the default tags.
errors.save: Could not save the default tags. Please try again.
errors.clear: Could not clear the default tags. Please try again.
